mapper.sql: order_product_info.id, order_product_info.order_id, order_product_info.product_name, order_product_info.product_code, order_product_info.price, order_product_info.quantity, order_product_info.update_time, order_product_info.create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM order_product_info
AND order_product_info.order_id = #{queryForm.orderId}
AND INSTR(order_product_info.product_name,#{queryForm.productName})
